message: Members of the CyReN Lab presented their posters at the CECS Research Poster Competition.
New book published: Cyber Resilience in Next-Generation Networks (Foundations and Trends in Networking).
Paper accepted in IEEE Networking Letters. Congratulations to Xingqi and Yuhui!
Poster accepted at ACM MobiHoc 2025. Congratulations Xingqi and Ritesh!
Elevated to the rank of Senior Member of the IEEE.
Presented a seminar at UM-Flint on AI-Driven Management and Orchestration of Next-Generation Networks.
Multi-university project on Zero Trust cybersecurity for 5G networks kicks off, supported by the NSF.
Honored to receive the University-wide Outstanding Dissertation Award from New York University.
